name: workflow closed-loop step spec-to-plan-first hands off the spec to the /plan-first command
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/closed-loop-test.sh" --step spec-to-plan-first --spec-id s1 --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'plan_first_invoked=true' out.txt && grep -q 'plan_input_spec=s1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
